payload.title: R0004 refinement: exempt 'use super::*;' inside #[cfg(test)] mod
payload.description: FP audit: 11 of 12 R0004 hits against anyhow were 'use super::*;' inside #[cfg(test)] mod tests {}, which is the universal Rust test idiom. Either exempt that specific pattern, or extend the test-scope exemption metadata (Rule::is_exempt_in_cfg_test, added in RT-35-era work) to cover R0004 as a config option.
